**输入：** words = ["jump","run","run","jump","run"]

**输出：** [3,0,0,3,3]

**解释：**

- 移除下标 0：
  - `words` 变为 `["run", "run", "jump", "run"]`

  - 最长的相邻对是 `["run", "run"]`，其公共前缀为 `"run"`（长度为 3）

**示例 2：**

**输入：** words = ["dog","racer","car"]

**输出：** [0,0,0]

**解释：**

- 移除任意下标都会导致答案为 0。

 

**提示：**

- `1 <= words.length <= 105`
- `1 <= words[i].length <= 104`
- `words[i]` 仅由小写英文字母组成。
- `words[i]` 的长度总和不超过 `105`。

using namespace std;

long long common_prefix(const string& a, const string& b) {
    long long len = 0;
    while (len < a.length() && len < b.length() && a[len] == b[len]) {
        len++;
    }
    return len;
}

vector<long long> solve(vector<string> words) {
    int n = words.size();
    if (n == 1) {
        return {0};
    }
    int m = n - 1;
    vector<long long> prefixes(m);
    for (int j = 0; j < m; ++j) {
        prefixes[j] = common_prefix(words[j], words[j + 1]);
    }

    // Compute prefix_max and suffix_max
    vector<long long> prefix_max(m);
    prefix_max[0] = prefixes[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
        prefix_max[i] = max(prefix_max[i - 1], prefixes[i]);
    }

    vector<long long> suffix_max(m);
    suffix_max[m - 1] = prefixes[m - 1];
    for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
        suffix_max[i] = max(prefixes[i], suffix_max[i + 1]);
    }

    vector<long long> answer(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        long long max_original = 0;
        int j1 = i - 1;
        int j2 = i;
        if (m == 0) {
            max_original = 0;
        } else {
            if (j1 >= 0 && j2 < m) {
                // both j1 and j2 are valid
                long long part1 = 0;
                if (j1 - 1 >= 0) {
                    part1 = prefix_max[j1 - 1];
                } else {
                    part1 = 0;
                }
                long long part2 = 0;
                if (j2 + 1 < m) {
                    part2 = suffix_max[j2 + 1];
                } else {
                    part2 = 0;
                }
                max_original = max(part1, part2);
            } else if (j1 >= 0) {
                // j2 is invalid (i >= m)
                long long part1 = 0;
                if (j1 - 1 >= 0) {
                    part1 = prefix_max[j1 - 1];
                } else {

            } else if (j2 < m) {
                // j1 is invalid (i ==0)

                if (j2 + 1 < m) {
                    part2 = suffix_max[j2 + 1];
                } else {

            } else {
                // both invalid (n=1, but handled earlier)
                max_original = 0;
            }
        }

        long long new_pair = 0;
        if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
            new_pair = common_prefix(words[i - 1], words[i + 1]);

        if (n - 1 >= 2) {
            answer[i] = max(max_original, new_pair);

        }
